title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six 3: Gold Edition
notes: The game works, however in menu/planning screen, the mouse is a bit hard to move/odd.

title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six® 3 Gold
notes: Runs almost perfectly out of the box. There's a bit of stuttering, but this was experienced in Windows too. Following these instruction helped: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=739436571

Moving the window to another monitor causes some oddness, but found it to be easily remedied by opening and closing the options menu.  This occurs for me at both game launch and mission start (starts on wrong monitor).
title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six® 3 Gold

notes: Stutters in-game with default config, but these edits help: 1. In-game Options, set Sound -> Audio Virtualization to "No Virtualization" 2. editing RavenShield.ini (location differs based on installation, roughly steamapps/common/Rainbow Six 3 Gold/system/RavenShield.ini) with the following (some options may already be set): ReduceMouseLag=False UseHardwareTL=False UseHardwareVS=False MaxPixelShaderVersion=1 UseVSync=True
title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six® 3 Gold

notes: To load AthenaSword by default,  add "mod=AthenaSword" to game launch options ('Properties' -> 'Set launch options' in Steam UI)
title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six® 3 Gold

notes: game little stutters (vsync problem?), mouse feels weird in menu and also a bit ingame. Good playable until so far
